workspace.name: Sonrise Ministries Inc.
workspace.story: Sonrise Ministries nurtures abandoned and vulnerable babies in Jinja, Uganda by providing loving caregivers, medical attention, and pathways to permanent family care.

projects.title: Baby Home
projects.description: Holistic residential care for infants and toddlers.

projects.title: Family Reintegration
projects.description: Preparing families and providing follow-up once children are reunited.

projects.title: Community Health Clinics
projects.description: Partner-supported clinics ensuring babies receive critical medical care.

recipients_category.name: Baby Home Residents
recipients_category.description: Infants and toddlers currently in the Sonrise Baby Home.

recipients.story: Hope was welcomed to Sonrise after being found abandoned; she is thriving with round-the-clock care.

news.title: New Cribs Installed at Baby Home
news.excerpt: Generous partners funded safer bedding for infants.
news.body: Thanks to campaign supporters, Sonrise replaced aging cribs with safe new models and upgraded mosquito netting.

pdfs.description: Monthly newsletter featuring baby stories and milestones.
